---
name: "Bootstrap Mobile Project"
description: "Bootstrap or refine the BandFan mobile companion app plan or project scaffold from the .migrate package."
argument-hint: "State whether the task is planning, scaffold creation, or first-screen implementation."
---
Bootstrap the BandFan mobile companion app.

Requirements:

- read `docs/context.md`, `docs/scope.md`, and `docs/launch-instructions.md`
- keep the first slice fan-focused and mobile-first
- assume the app is separate from the current web runtime
- reuse backend auth and API seams where possible
- document contract gaps instead of hiding them in the client
- summarize what was created, what remains blocked, and what should come next
